name: Finished Interior
description: All interior surfaces finished (stained/painted) instead of standard liner.
notes: Triggers full finishing sub-assembly on box interior. Required for open cabinets.

name: Sink Cutout
description: CNC cutout in cabinet bottom for sink undermount.
notes: Adds CNC time. Small material waste. Usually paired with false_front.

name: False Front
description: Decorative panel in drawer space with no drawer box behind it.
notes: Replaces drawer box sub-assembly with panel-only. Still needs hinge/push hardware.

name: Closet Rod
description: Closet rod installed inside cabinet with rod cups.
notes: Adds rod material (LF × cabinet depth) + install labor. Seen on pantry/closet pieces.

name: Rollout Shelf (each)
description: Rollout shelf = drawer box on full-extension slides. Add per qty.
notes: Each rollout = drawer box labor + full-extension slides. Count them individually.

name: Trash Pullout
description: Soft-close pullout trash hardware inside base cabinet.
notes: Specialty hardware cost + assembly labor. Usually replaces standard shelf.

name: Lazy Susan
description: Rotating shelf hardware. Full-circle or kidney-shaped.
notes: Special hardware + assembly. Typically 2-door corner cabinet.

name: Glass Door (per door)
description: Door has glass panel instead of solid wood/MDF.
notes: Door material changes entirely (buyout glass door or frame + glass). Finish labor similar.

name: Glass Insert (per door)
description: Shop-built door with glass panel inserted (not buyout door).
notes: Adds routing + glass sourcing. More labor than solid door.

name: Applied End Panel
description: Panelized end applied to exposed cabinet side.
notes: Additional panel cut + finish + apply. Usually matches door style.

name: Furniture Toe / Bun Foot
description: Decorative furniture-style toekick or bun feet instead of standard toe.
notes: Different toe construction. May add height. Labor and material vary.

name: Light Rail Molding
description: Horizontal molding applied to bottom of upper cabinets.
notes: LF of cabinet run × material cost. Install labor minimal.

name: Crown Molding
description: Crown profile applied to top of uppers or talls.
notes: LF × profile material cost. Miter/coping labor. Tracked in Molding Totals report.

name: 45° Corner Hinge
description: Specialty hinge required for 45° diagonal corner cabinets. Different plate and cup than standard.
notes: Not interchangeable with standard Blum. Flag auto-applies when cabinet type is B-CORNER-45 or W-CORNER-45.

name: Soft Close Hinges
description: Blum soft-close hinge upgrade.
notes: Material delta only (standard hinge → Blum soft-close). No labor change.

name: Push to Open
description: Push-to-open hardware (no pull required).
notes: Material only. Removes pull cost. Used on appliance garages and hidden cabinets.

name: Pull Allowance Override
description: Use a dollar allowance instead of a specific pull from library.
notes: Tiers: $5 / $10 / $15 / $20 / $35 / $50 / $75 / $100+ / custom (free entry). Use when pull not in library or client-supplied. $5-$15 = basic/builder. $20-$35 = standard decorative. $50+ = specialty/custom.

name: Glaze Finish
description: Glaze color applied over base finish and wiped back.
notes: Adds finishing step between sealer and topcoat. Extra material + significant labor.

name: Distressing / Aging
description: Physical distressing before finish (rub-through
notes: worm holes

name: Custom Labor Override
description: Override for non-standard labor. Die walls
notes: complex geometry

name: End Panel Left
description: Applied end panel needed on the LEFT side of this cabinet.
notes: Flag for BOM count. Engine adds panel SF cost to this line item.

name: End Panel Right
description: Applied end panel needed on the RIGHT side of this cabinet.
notes: Flag for BOM count. Engine adds panel SF cost to this line item.

name: Filler Left
description: Filler strip needed on the LEFT side of this cabinet.
notes: Cut-down panel strip. Material only.

name: Filler Right
description: Filler strip needed on the RIGHT side of this cabinet.
notes: Cut-down panel strip. Material only.
